FBE-ECHOES_OF_TIME.title: Echoes of Time
FBE-ECHOES_OF_TIME.pages.INITIAL.descrip:
You sit cross-legged upon a stone slab.
Firelight dances across the floor and walls, revealing [purple]mottled veins in the stone[/purple] and [green]runes flickering with ghostly light[/green].

In the stillness, you realize your memories have begun to blur—
How long have you been climbing since entering this Spire?
[sine]How many times have you been [red]revived[/red] in Neow's cycle?[/sine]

Perhaps this is your only chance to [gold]reflect[/gold] on it all.
FBE-ECHOES_OF_TIME.pages.TRY_TO_RECALL_C:
You shut your eyes and let your consciousness sink.
A violent tide of memories [purple]ravages[/purple] your mind, spreading like some [red][sine]ancient curse[/sine][/red].

At the same time, a [sine][gold]mysterious power[/gold][/sine] flows through your thoughts. You feel [blue]souls[/blue] long dormant within the Spire flooding into you.
FBE-ECHOES_OF_TIME.pages.STOP_THINKING_C:
You shake your head and cast the tangled thoughts aside.
Your mind gradually settles, and the shadows lurking within the shrine slowly recede.

As long as you keep moving forward, one day these questions will find an [gold]answer[/gold][sine]... probably.[/sine]
FBE-TEST_EVENT.title: Meeting Godot
FBE-TEST_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.description:
The bench at the crossroads is empty. Only the wind stirs the grass.

[sine]Then you see him.[/sine]

A small blue silhouette sits quietly, as though waiting for a letter that will never arrive—or for a build that is forever ‘almost done.’

[gold]Godot[/gold] raises his eyes—if those count as eyes—and speaks in a tone so flat it is almost gentle:

“[sine]It is still early... and there is still a long time to go. Would you pay a small price for something to... pass the wait?[/sine]”
FBE-TEST_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_TYPE.descrip:
Godot reaches beneath the bench and pulls out a cloth bundle—or perhaps the patience of the entire universe.

“[sine]You could have something to drink... or take a few cards. Either way,[/sine]” he pauses, “[sine]we are not going anywhere.[/sine]”
FBE-TEST_EVENT.pages.CHOOSE_TYPE.options: Receive a Potion reward, then bid this wait farewell.
Receive a card reward, then bid this wait farewell.
FBE-TEST_EVENT.pages.POTIONS_CHOSEN.desc:
The liquid sways gently in its bottle, like the rhythm of a distant engine idling.

[gold]Godot[/gold] raises the empty mouth of the bottle toward you, as though toasting you—or time itself.

[sine]...All right. You can wait out the rest on your own.[/sine]
FBE-TEST_EVENT.pages.CARDS_CHOSEN.descri:
The edges of the cards rasp across your fingers with a faint snap—at least livelier than silence.

[gold]Godot[/gold] watches you put them away and nods.

[sine]Take them. The road is long. Do not let the waiting become... too quiet.[/sine]
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.title: Strange Road Sign
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.pages.INITIAL.desc:
You suddenly come upon a [purple]strange road sign[/purple].

It points in two different directions: [red][sine]ATTACK-HA![/sine][/red] and [blue][sine]DEFEND-HA![/sine][/blue].

What does any of this mean? Who put it here?
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.pages.INITIAL.opti: Remove [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold] cards. Choose 1 of [blue]3[/blue] “Strike” cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].
Gain [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold]. At the start of the next [blue]2[/blue] combats, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.pages.GO_ATTACK_CH:
You decide to follow the path marked “ATTACK-HA!”

You are now filled with the [red][sine]urge to speak your mind[/sine][/red].
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.pages.GO_DEFEND_CH:
You follow the path marked “DEFEND-HA!”

You feel full of [sine][blue]Kimi spirit[/blue][/sine]!
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.pages.REMOVE_SIGN_:
You pull the [purple]road sign[/purple] out of the ground. Someone buried [gold]money[/gold] here!

Still, you suspect you may have done something [red]bad[/red].
FBE-STRANGE_ROAD_SIGN.pages.GO_ATTACK.se: Choose a card to add to your Deck.
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.title: Devil Room
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.description: [sine]With a dreadful sound effect, a black door rises before you.[/sine]
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.WALKAWAY_CHOSEN.des:
You shout at the door: [orange][jitter]Not even a dog would enter the Devil Room![/jitter][/orange]

Then you leave without looking back.
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.ENTER.description: The room's wares sit silently on display. Every [gold]gift[/gold] bears a different [red]price[/red].
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.PURCHASE.descriptio: It seems you can continue making [red]deals[/red].
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.SOLD_OUT.descriptio: You buy every last [gold]item[/gold] in one go.
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.LEAVE_ROOM_CHOSEN.d:
You leave after finishing your shopping.

What a [red]deal[/red].
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.pages.NO_PURCHASE.descrip:
You look around, but [sine]buy nothing[/sine].

The Devil's stare [jitter]bores into your back[/jitter], and you flee toward the entrance as fast as you can.
FBE-DEVIL_ROOM.loss: Gaaah! {character} thought they could come back to life again.
FBE-QUANTUM_TOWER.title: The Vanishing Tower
FBE-QUANTUM_TOWER.pages.INITIAL.descript:
Desolation stretches in every direction.

There is nothing in the clearing before you.
FBE-QUANTUM_TOWER.pages.BLINK.descriptio:
This should not change anything, but...

Was there a [purple]tower[/purple] here before?
FBE-QUANTUM_TOWER.pages.ENTER_TOWER_CHOS:
Inside the tower, you find [purple]documents[/purple] written in [green]strange symbols[/green].
[jitter][red]Your thoughts dissolve into confusion[/red][/jitter], and you stagger back outside.

When you look behind you, only an empty clearing remains.
FBE-QUANTUM_TOWER.pages.BLINK_AGAIN_CHOS:
There was never any [purple]tower[/purple].

You are simply too tired.
FBE-QUANTUM_TOWER.selectionScreenPrompt: Choose up to {Count} cards to [gold]Enchant[/gold] with [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
